choose.otherwise:
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME =
'SEQ_WEEKLY_SEASON_NO'
'SEQ_MONTHLY_SEASON_NO'
'SEQ_YEARLY_SEASON_NO'

mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUM, USER_ID, START_POINT, CURRENT_POINT, RETURN_RATE, "RANK" FROM (SELECT ROWNUM AS ROW_NUM, USER_ID, START_POINT, CURRENT_POINT, RETURN_RATE, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CURRENT_POINT DESC) AS "RANK" FROM SEASON_RANKINGS WHERE SEASON_PERIOD = #{seasonPeriod} AND SEASON_NO = #{seasonNo} ORDER BY RETURN_RATE DESC) WHERE ROW_NUM BETWEEN #{pageReq.start} AND #{pageReq.end}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM, USER_ID, START_POINT, CURRENT_POINT, RETURN_RATE, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CURRENT_POINT DESC) AS RANK FROM WEEKLY_RANKINGS ORDER BY RETURN_RATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM, USER_ID, START_POINT, CURRENT_POINT, RETURN_RATE, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CURRENT_POINT DESC) AS RANK FROM MONTHLY_RANKINGS ORDER BY RETURN_RATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM, USER_ID, START_POINT, CURRENT_POINT, RETURN_RATE, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CURRENT_POINT DESC) AS RANK FROM YEARLY_RANKINGS ORDER BY RETURN_RATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM, USER_ID, POINTS, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY POINTS DESC) AS RANK FROM MEMBERS ORDER BY POINTS DESC) WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SEASON_RANKINGS S USING ( SELECT M.USER_ID, (M.POINTS + NVL(T.TOTAL_STOCK_PRICE, 0)) AS TOTAL_ASSET FROM MEMBERS M LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT USER_ID, SUM(H.TOTAL_COUNT * S.CURRENT_PRICE) AS TOTAL_STOCK_PRICE FROM HOLDINGS H JOIN STOCKS S ON (H.STOCK_ID = S.STOCK_ID) GROUP BY USER_ID) T ON M.USER_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE M.STATUS = 'Y' ) T ON ((S.SEASON_PERIOD = 'WEEKLY' AND S.SEASON_NO = (SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_WEEKLY_SEASON_NO') OR S.SEASON_PERIOD = 'MONTHLY' AND S.SEASON_NO = (SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_MONTHLY_SEASON_NO') OR S.SEASON_PERIOD = 'YEARLY' AND S.SEASON_NO = (SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_YEARLY_SEASON_NO') OR S.SEASON_PERIOD = 'ALL') AND S.USER_ID = T.USER_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET S.CURRENT_POINT = T.TOTAL_ASSET, S.RETURN_RATE = (T.TOTAL_ASSET - S.START_POINT) / S.START_POINT * 100
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SEASON_RANKINGS(RANKING_NO ,USER_ID ,START_POINT ,CURRENT_POINT ,RETURN_RATE ,SEASON_PERIOD ,SEASON_NO) SELECT SEQ_RANKING_NO.NEXTVAL ,T.USER_ID ,10000000 ,T.TOTAL_ASSET ,(T.TOTAL_ASSET - 10000000) / 10000000 * 100 ,#{seasonPeriod} ,(
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_WEEKLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_MONTHLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_YEARLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
) FROM ( SELECT M.USER_ID, (M.POINTS + NVL(T.TOTAL_STOCK_PRICE, 0)) AS TOTAL_ASSET FROM ( SELECT * FROM MEMBERS WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND USER_ID NOT IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SEASON_RANKINGS WHERE SEASON_PERIOD = #{seasonPeriod} AND SEASON_NO = (
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_WEEKLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_MONTHLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_YEARLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
) ) ) M LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT USER_ID, SUM(H.TOTAL_COUNT * S.CURRENT_PRICE) AS TOTAL_STOCK_PRICE FROM HOLDINGS H JOIN STOCKS S ON (H.STOCK_ID = S.STOCK_ID) GROUP BY USER_ID) T ON M.USER_ID = T.USER_ID ) T

INSERT INTO SEASON_RANKINGS(RANKING_NO ,USER_ID ,START_POINT ,CURRENT_POINT ,RETURN_RATE ,SEASON_PERIOD ,SEASON_NO) SELECT SEQ_RANKING_NO.NEXTVAL ,T.USER_ID ,T.TOTAL_ASSET ,T.TOTAL_ASSET ,0 ,#{seasonPeriod} ,(
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_WEEKLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_MONTHLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME='SEQ_YEARLY_SEASON_NO'
) FROM ( SELECT M.USER_ID, (M.POINTS + NVL(T.TOTAL_STOCK_PRICE, 0)) AS TOTAL_ASSET FROM MEMBERS M LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT USER_ID, SUM(H.TOTAL_COUNT * S.CURRENT_PRICE) AS TOTAL_STOCK_PRICE FROM HOLDINGS H JOIN STOCKS S ON (H.STOCK_ID = S.STOCK_ID) GROUP BY USER_ID) T ON M.USER_ID = T.USER_ID WHERE M.STATUS = 'Y' ) T
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SEASON_RANKINGS WHERE SEASON_PERIOD = #{seasonPeriod} AND SEASON_NO = (
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME = 'SEQ_WEEKLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME = 'SEQ_MONTHLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT LAST_NUMBER - 1 FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME = 'SEQ_YEARLY_SEASON_NO'
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
)
